name: Bourbon Barrel Aged Dark Apparition
description: Seven malts were used to create deep flavors of coffee, chocolate, caramel, and molasses. A hint of bitterness and herbal character from carefully selected European and American hops help support the monolithic maltiness. After conditioning in stainless steel, the beer was transferred to into bourbon barrels. Dark Apparition waited patiently in oak barrels until the time was right to spring forth with its ghostly gusto. A truly decadent brew that is intended to be poured into your favorite snifter and given time to warm up from its dark and cool resting place.

This is the first release of our ultra limited 'Brown Bag' series that pushes our boundaries with the way we make IPA, and is only available at Jackie O's locations. FAF Alert!!

name: Prodigality
description: Churning out complexity through time and heat. The solo grain, Maris Otter, brims the mash tun for a long soak. A portion of the first runnings were boiled and reduced, triggering the Maillard Reaction; through which, the vigorous heating of sugars adds a deeper color and flavor. Continuing on with an extended boil to increase said reaction. A prolonged nap of 20 months in bourbon barrels finishes off this luxurious prize. Indulge in Prodigality’s warm embrace with notes of burnt sugar, sweet prune, oak, and leather.

name: Hearth Fire Mexican Hot Chocolate Stout
description: This beer is built around rich chocolate, coffee, and warming spice. Cocoa nibs, lactose, cinnamon, orange peel, and fresh-crushed nutmeg create a silky, dessert-like body, while Deeper Roots Alchemy Espresso layers in deep roasted coffee character. A carefully balanced six-pepper blend adds warmth rather than heat. Brewed on a base on abase of English malts with just a hint of vanilla, the result is spicy, sweet, and complex, with lingering chocolate-coffee depth.

name: Walking Taco
description: A classic Mexican brew gets the Midwestern treatment! Like tasty tacos crunched up in your favorite bag of chips, our Mexican-style lager with lime is sure to be a crushable crowd pleaser for any occasion.

name: Trip Sitter
description: pineapple infused

name: Take A Hike
description: Brewed in partnership with Great Ohio Lodges and Ohio State Parks Foundation, Take A Hike is an IPA made for the trailblazer in all of us. Brewed with Citra, Mosaic and Simone hops. It delivers vibrant Burt's of citrus, tropical fruit and stone fruit layered over hints of pine and a crisp balanced bitterness.

name: Marimba
description: This tart fruit beer is brewed with a simple base of Pilson malt and conditioned on huge portions of sweet pineapple concentrate. Notes of vibrant, tropical pineapple are balanced by a clean, refreshing snappy acidity with a light sweetness.

name: Dog Day
description: American IPA brewed with Pilsner,Vienna, and Dextrin malt and hopped with Mosaic, El Dorado, and Krush. Bright golden with aromas of citrus and tropical fruit, followed by flavors of orange, mango, and stone fruit with firm bitterness and a clean, dry finish.
